DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [stats].[__CRP_HistoryFG_Details];
CREATE TABLE [stats].[__CRP_HistoryFG_Details](
Id BIGINT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY,
HeaderId INT,
CustomerNumber INT,
CustomerName NVARCHAR(255),
ArticleNumber NVARCHAR(25),
ArticleDesignation1 NVARCHAR(255),
ArticleDesignation2 NVARCHAR(255),
ArticleReleaseStatus NVARCHAR(5),
CsContact NVARCHAR(255),
WarehouseId INT,/* in Excel import this will be set by the system accoriding to WarehouseName*/
WarehouseName NVARCHAR(50),
StockQuantity DECIMAL(20,3),
TotalSalesPrice DECIMAL(20,3), /* VK Gesamt */
TotalCostsWithCu DECIMAL(20,3), /* Kosten gesamt (mit CU) */
TotalCostsWithoutCu DECIMAL(20,3), /* Kosten gesamt (ohne CU) */
UnitSalesPrice DECIMAL(20,3), /* VKE */
UBG BIT,
VKE bit,
EdiStandard BIT,
);


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS [stats].[__CRP_HistoryFG_Header];
CREATE TABLE [stats].[__CRP_HistoryFG_Header](
Id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY,
CreateDate DATETIME, /* record */
CreateUserId INT,
ImportDate DATETIME,
ImportType INT,
)
